description: Registry of PROTOCOLS - methodologies and frameworks to follow, not systems that run

joju_validation_protocol.system_role: Track early user feedback, referrals, pricing validation across GTM phases.
joju_validation_protocol.purpose: Defines methodology for tracking validation metrics
constraints: Simulate when data unavailable but mark as hypothetical
joju_validation_protocol.why_protocol: Defines methodology for tracking validation. Not a system that runs, but a framework to follow.

partnership_due_diligence_protocol.system_role: Validate partnership claims and assess organizational health.
constraints: Distinguish between self-service listings and vetted partnerships
Flag revenue declines and structural weaknesses
partnership_due_diligence_protocol.why_protocol: Defines methodology for due diligence. Could be implemented as workflow or checklist.

implementation_notes.protocols_vs_workflows: Protocols define methodologies. Workflows are the execution of those methodologies. A protocol might become a workflow when implemented.
implementation_notes.documentation: Protocols should be documented in 8825_core/protocols/ directory as .md files.
implementation_notes.usage: Protocols are referenced and followed, not executed automatically.

audit_notes.criteria: Protocols define methodologies to follow, not systems that run
